data.body:
## Description
Rewrite plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md Phase 1 (Auto-Detection) and Phase 2 (Socratic Dialogue) to pass all RED tests from task 3153-7fb3. The rewrite must:

1. Add auto-detection logic that reads project files (package.json, .husky/pre-commit, .github/workflows/*.yml, pyproject.toml, test directories) BEFORE asking questions
2. Present detected configuration for confirmation rather than asking open-ended questions
3. Use Socratic dialogue style: open-ended questions with follow-ups, not rigid multiple-choice menus
4. Generate complete dso-config.conf with ALL required keys:
   - dso.plugin_root (resolved to absolute path via realpath or git rev-parse)
   - format.extensions, format.source_dirs (detected from stack)
   - test_gate.test_dirs (detected from test directory structure)
   - commands.validate (composed from detected test/lint/format commands)
   - tickets.directory (default: .tickets-tracker)
   - checkpoint.marker_file (default: .checkpoint-pending-rollback)
   - review.behavioral_patterns (semicolon-delimited globs based on project structure)
5. Define fallback behavior: prompt user → documented default → omit with explanatory comment
6. Confirm CI workflow name by listing actual .github/workflows/*.yml filenames
7. Detect and merge with existing dso-config.conf rather than overwriting
8. Ask about Jira bridge (project key only — credentials remain env vars)

SAFEGUARD FILE: plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md is protected per CLAUDE.md rule 20.

## File Impact
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md

## TDD Requirement
Depends on task 3153-7fb3 (RED). After modification, all RED tests must pass (GREEN).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh 2>&1 | tail -3
- [ ] All RED tests from 3153-7fb3 now pass
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/skills/test-onboarding-skill.sh 2>&1 | grep -c PASS | awk '{exit ($1 < 25)}'
- [ ] SKILL.md references auto-detection before asking
  Verify: grep -qiE 'auto-detect|read.*before.*ask' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
- [ ] SKILL.md references all required config keys
  Verify: grep -c 'dso.plugin_root\|format.extensions\|test_gate.test_dirs\|commands.validate\|tickets.directory\|checkpoint.marker_file\|review.behavioral_patterns' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md | awk '{exit ($1 < 6)}'
- [ ] SKILL.md references Jira project key configuration
  Verify: grep -qi 'jira.*project' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/skills/onboarding/SKILL.md
